entries.title: Exposition on Psalm 12 on psalms 12:7
entries.excerpt: "You, O Lord, shall preserve us, and keep us from this generation to eternity" [Psalm 12:7]: here as needy and poor, there as wealthy and rich.

entries.title: EXPLANATION OF THE PSALMS 12:8 on psalms 12:7
entries.excerpt: Here he consoles us in tribulations while [in heaven] he establishes us in the security of eternity. Here he helps us, but there he glorifies and crowns us. In this way, a most devoted Creator preserves us here in order that we may not perish and that he may bless us there so that we can no longer be miserable in any way.

entries.title: COMMENTARY ON PSALM 12 on psalms 12:7
entries.excerpt: Even if the godless and demons and agitators surround us, even if they besiege us and cut us off, you will render us superior with your help.

entries.title: COMMENTARY ON THE PSALMS 12:4 on psalms 12:7
entries.excerpt: Guarded by your grace we shall not only escape the wiles of the present generation but shall also be provided with everlasting salvation.

entries.title: Exposition on the Psalms of David on psalms 12:7
entries.excerpt: And the prophet responds: "You therefore, O Lord, will keep us from evil." "And you will guard us in good, from this generation forever."
